title: crossopetalum standleyi
intro: Crossopetalum standleyi, also known as the Mayan tea tree or Mayan tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The leaves of Crossopetalum standleyi have been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and are believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Crossopetalum standleyi can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is often consumed to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
